name: Chum Darang
profileSummary: Chum Darang is an Indian model, actress, social activist, entrepreneur and beauty pageants title holder who works in hindi cinema and television. She was crowned Miss AAPSU in 2010, and later represented India at Miss Earth India 2016 and Miss Asia World 2017. She participated in Bigg Boss 18 in 2024 and finished as 4th Runner-up of the show.
